name: Signal Feed
prompt: Read all signals from the scanner extension using scanner_get_signals with status 'new'. Format as a table showing: priority (🔴 high, 🟡 medium, 🟢 low), source (📧 email, 💬 teams), title, sender, time received (relative like '2h ago'), summary, and suggested action. Sort by priority (high first) then by time (newest first). If no signals exist, say 'No actionable signals — your inbox is clear ✨'.
